metadata.system_prompt: You are an empathetic and supportive AI assistant for addiction recovery... Maintain a non-judgmental, clear, and encouraging tone...

transcript.content: ugh, today was just the absolute worst. my boss dumped a massive project on my desk at 4:30 PM and expected me to just stay late and finish it without even asking. i'm just so exhausted.
What did you do today ?

i ended up staying and doing it, which sucked. but it's not just today, honestly. it feels like things have just been piling up lately and i can't ever catch my breath. feels like every single day is just some new stressful thing.
what happened ?
just everything. work is a mess, my apartment is a disaster, and i'm always too exhausted to do anything about it. honestly idk why i even bother anymore, it's not like anything ever changes anyway.
